## Summary

- Describe the main change in 1-3 bullets.

## Testing

- [ ] `python -m py_compile __init__.py server.py`
- [ ] Manual UI smoke test in ComfyUI
- [ ] Screenshots updated if the UI changed

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept secrets and tokens out of commits and screenshots
- [ ] I updated documentation where behavior changed
- [ ] I verified new files belong in the repo and generated files stay ignored
